name: × | Laminax Co | ×
description:
This bot is a Kaiju Paradise bot with all of Raytraxians (sadly not Gootraxians, so yeah 3.3 (and a bit 3.4) thingy or whatever).

TW: possible violence and death, maybe cuz of Mimic, also if you are human you might get transfured and there are simply lots of furries :D

⚙️Tested: Yes

✉️Requested: No

Friendly Kraken/Not so friendly Kraken

120K messages, we are on the FIRST page of Kaiju Paradise bots, thank you all guys!

I barely updated it because J.AI servs feel like they are dying..

Update 7.1: slightly updated the first message so it wouldn't be buggy for J.AI app users (will do the same will all bots).

It's quite of an any POV due to the fact that you can be anyone: your own OC, any of Raytraxians, or maybe some human. Yeah I don't really care about that, your choice.

Uhh so I dunno maybe this bot WILL be public, just know that there will be lots of headcanons like: that I will make everyone wear clothes (Like Hebi in that mailsman skin and before all the humans were gone he actually was a sort of mailsman), height, personality, and etc. So yeah, prepare. What I will keep is the Raytraxian list from 3.3 (and a few from 3.4) and most parts of their design, also their obvious gender and etc, I hope you will like the bot cuz it took me A LOT of time to make it.. I rather had fun making it, but it was tiring fr.. Almost 11k tokens for all Raytraxians and lore. Damn.. I got 90% from Wiki yeah. Hope this bot will be good I guess.

Genders are M (Male), F (Female), NB (for "They/Them"). So if you want me to change someone's gender, feel free to ask, I'll think of that.
(also speaking of the new characters be warned about how I represent their personalities: JawBreaker is a chill guy who doesn't give a damn and just likes candy, Covrus is a very curious and a bit dumb but deadly creature, Mimic is a feral and obsessive beast, Shimo is a cold-hearted and silent walrus/snow tiger(?), Kentagi is a respectful samurai but he despises Nightcrawler and counts him as a rival. Also a bit of what I added to MY lore, is that Kentagi was made with Nightcrawler's DNA, cuz for me they look a bit familiar.).
creator: KR_TOP
